scripts.backend:stop: sh -c 'pid=$(lsof -nP -iTCP:7001 -sTCP:LISTEN -t); if [ -n "$pid" ]; then kill -9 "$pid"; echo "Stopped backend on 7001 (PID $pid)"; else echo "No backend running on 7001"; fi'
scripts.backend:restart: npm run backend:stop && npm run backend:start
scripts.proctor:install: sh -c 'cd backend/proctor && rm -rf .venv && python3 -m venv .venv && . .venv/bin/activate && pip install --upgrade pip && pip install -r requirements.txt'
scripts.proctor:start: sh -c 'cd backend/proctor && if [ ! -x .venv/bin/uvicorn ]; then echo "Run: npm run proctor:install" && exit 1; fi; . .venv/bin/activate && uvicorn aiDetectionService:app --host 0.0.0.0 --port 8001'
scripts.proctor:stop: sh -c 'pid=$(lsof -nP -iTCP:8001 -sTCP:LISTEN -t); if [ -n "$pid" ]; then kill -9 "$pid"; echo "Stopped proctor on 8001 (PID $pid)"; else echo "No proctor running on 8001"; fi'
scripts.proctor:restart: npm run proctor:stop && npm run proctor:start
scripts.review:status: sh -c 'echo "=== Services for college review ==="; echo "Frontend (5173):"; lsof -nP -iTCP:5173 -sTCP:LISTEN || echo "  not running — run: npm run dev"; echo "Backend API (7001):"; lsof -nP -iTCP:7001 -sTCP:LISTEN || echo "  not running — run: npm run backend:start"; echo "Proctor AI (8001, optional):"; lsof -nP -iTCP:8001 -sTCP:LISTEN || echo "  not running — run: npm run proctor:start"'
scripts.review:verify: npm run typecheck && npm run test:unit && npm run verify
